description: List Wbs Attributes for a given project

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by. If the field is passed with a - (Example: -name) it is sorted in reverse order. For multiple sort fields, separate  them with a comma (Example: name,-position)

name.description: Attribute Description. Unique within the project.

position.description: Position of the Attribute in the Company. Unique within the Project.

segment_id.description: A unique identifier for Wbs code read model. Cannot be fetched  directly from an API.
